revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Module:Armenian]]": Up to template-protection as dependency of template-protected [[Module:Year in various calendars]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
-- This module implements {{Armenian}}. It converts numbers to old Armenian -- numerals, for numbers from 1-29999.
local p = {}
function p.main( frame ) -- If we are being called from #invoke, then the number is the first positional -- argument. If not, it is the frame parameter. local num if frame == mw.getCurrentFrame() then num = frame:getParent().args[ 1 ] local frameArgsNum = frame.args[ 1 ] if frameArgsNum then num = frameArgsNum end else num = frame end
-- Convert the input to an integer if possible. if type( num ) ~= 'number' then num = tonumber( num ) end if not num then return '' end
num = math.floor( num ) -- Exit if the number is not expressible in Armenian numerals. -- FIXME: Check if Armenian numerals can really be made 10,000x bigger through -- overlining them as it says in our article. (That claim is unsourced.) If they -- can, there is code at [[Module:Roman]] that can be stolen from to make it work. if num < 1 or num > 29999 then return '' end
local numerals = { { 20000, "Ֆ" }, { 10000, "Օ" }, { 9000, "Ք" }, { 8000, "Փ" }, { 7000, "Ւ" }, { 6000, "Ց" }, { 5000, "Ր" }, { 4000, "Տ" }, { 3000, "Վ" }, { 2000, "Ս" }, { 1000, "Ռ" }, { 900, "Ջ" }, { 800, "Պ" }, { 700, "Չ" }, { 600, "Ո" }, { 500, "Շ" }, { 400, "Ն" }, { 300, "Յ" }, { 200, "Մ" }, { 100, "Ճ" }, { 90, "Ղ" }, { 80, "Ձ" }, { 70, "Հ" }, { 60, "Կ" }, { 50, "Ծ" }, { 40, "Խ" }, { 30, "Լ" }, { 20, "Ի" }, { 10, "Ժ" }, { 9, "Թ" }, { 8, "Ը" }, { 7, "Է" }, { 6, "Զ" }, { 5, "Ե" }, { 4, "Դ" }, { 3, "Գ" }, { 2, "Բ" }, { 1, "Ա" } }
local ret = {} for _, v in ipairs( numerals ) do local val, letter = unpack( v ) while num >= val do num = num - val table.insert( ret, letter ) end end return table.concat( ret ) end
return p

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Module:Armenian]]": Up to template-protection as dependency of template-protected [[Module:Year in various calendars]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
-- This module implements {{Armenian}}. It converts numbers to old Armenian -- numerals, for numbers from 1-29999.
local p = {}
function p.main( frame ) -- If we are being called from #invoke, then the number is the first positional -- argument. If not, it is the frame parameter. local num if frame == mw.getCurrentFrame() then num = frame:getParent().args[ 1 ] local frameArgsNum = frame.args[ 1 ] if frameArgsNum then num = frameArgsNum end else num = frame end
-- Convert the input to an integer if possible. if type( num ) ~= 'number' then num = tonumber( num ) end if not num then return '' end
num = math.floor( num ) -- Exit if the number is not expressible in Armenian numerals. -- FIXME: Check if Armenian numerals can really be made 10,000x bigger through -- overlining them as it says in our article. (That claim is unsourced.) If they -- can, there is code at [[Module:Roman]] that can be stolen from to make it work. if num < 1 or num > 29999 then return '' end
local numerals = { { 20000, "Ֆ" }, { 10000, "Օ" }, { 9000, "Ք" }, { 8000, "Փ" }, { 7000, "Ւ" }, { 6000, "Ց" }, { 5000, "Ր" }, { 4000, "Տ" }, { 3000, "Վ" }, { 2000, "Ս" }, { 1000, "Ռ" }, { 900, "Ջ" }, { 800, "Պ" }, { 700, "Չ" }, { 600, "Ո" }, { 500, "Շ" }, { 400, "Ն" }, { 300, "Յ" }, { 200, "Մ" }, { 100, "Ճ" }, { 90, "Ղ" }, { 80, "Ձ" }, { 70, "Հ" }, { 60, "Կ" }, { 50, "Ծ" }, { 40, "Խ" }, { 30, "Լ" }, { 20, "Ի" }, { 10, "Ժ" }, { 9, "Թ" }, { 8, "Ը" }, { 7, "Է" }, { 6, "Զ" }, { 5, "Ե" }, { 4, "Դ" }, { 3, "Գ" }, { 2, "Բ" }, { 1, "Ա" } }
local ret = {} for _, v in ipairs( numerals ) do local val, letter = unpack( v ) while num >= val do num = num - val table.insert( ret, letter ) end end return table.concat( ret ) end
return p

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported
revision.text:
-- This module implements {{Armenian}}. It converts numbers to old Armenian -- numerals, for numbers from 1-29999.
local p = {}
function p.main( frame ) -- If we are being called from #invoke, then the number is the first positional -- argument. If not, it is the frame parameter. local num if frame == mw.getCurrentFrame() then num = frame:getParent().args[ 1 ] local frameArgsNum = frame.args[ 1 ] if frameArgsNum then num = frameArgsNum end else num = frame end
-- Convert the input to an integer if possible. if type( num ) ~= 'number' then num = tonumber( num ) end if not num then return '' end
num = math.floor( num ) -- Exit if the number is not expressible in Armenian numerals. -- FIXME: Check if Armenian numerals can really be made 10,000x bigger through -- overlining them as it says in our article. (That claim is unsourced.) If they -- can, there is code at [[Module:Roman]] that can be stolen from to make it work. if num < 1 or num > 29999 then return '' end
local numerals = { { 20000, "Ֆ" }, { 10000, "Օ" }, { 9000, "Ք" }, { 8000, "Փ" }, { 7000, "Ւ" }, { 6000, "Ց" }, { 5000, "Ր" }, { 4000, "Տ" }, { 3000, "Վ" }, { 2000, "Ս" }, { 1000, "Ռ" }, { 900, "Ջ" }, { 800, "Պ" }, { 700, "Չ" }, { 600, "Ո" }, { 500, "Շ" }, { 400, "Ն" }, { 300, "Յ" }, { 200, "Մ" }, { 100, "Ճ" }, { 90, "Ղ" }, { 80, "Ձ" }, { 70, "Հ" }, { 60, "Կ" }, { 50, "Ծ" }, { 40, "Խ" }, { 30, "Լ" }, { 20, "Ի" }, { 10, "Ժ" }, { 9, "Թ" }, { 8, "Ը" }, { 7, "Է" }, { 6, "Զ" }, { 5, "Ե" }, { 4, "Դ" }, { 3, "Գ" }, { 2, "Բ" }, { 1, "Ա" } }
local ret = {} for _, v in ipairs( numerals ) do local val, letter = unpack( v ) while num >= val do num = num - val table.insert( ret, letter ) end end return table.concat( ret ) end
return p
